creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi TAKAHASHI-san,

Your shar file seems to be based on japanese/asterisk-sounds, which I
have updated.
http://www.freshports.org/commit.php?category=japanese&port=asterisk-sounds&files=yes&message_id=201005251355.o4PDtANN051039@repoman.freebsd.org
Could you confirm the change and send a new shar file for this port?

Thanks,

--
TAKATSU Tomonari
